headline: Keyera Provides Update on Timing of Acquisition of Plains' Canadian NGL Business
summary: Keyera Corp. (TSX: KEY) ("Keyera" or the "Company") today provided an update on the expected timing surrounding its previously announced acquisition of Plains' Canadian natural gas liquids business.

headline: The Bank of Nova Scotia (BNS) Looking to Raise Keycorp Stake to 20%
summary: The Bank of Nova Scotia (NYSE:BNS) is included among the 15 Large Cap Stocks with Highest Dividends. The Bank of Nova Scotia (NYSE:BNS) is one of Canada’s largest banks with a strong presence across the Americas. The company offers personal, business, and commercial banking, wealth management and private banking, corporate and investment banking, and capital […]
